calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:15am
Cause called for Small Claims appeals. Judge Pro Tem James H. Fleming, clerk-Beth Wilber,
nothing on record:
Kenneth A. Lipson, Esq. appears for appellant Michael Nazlukhanyan. Oleg Obukhova appears as Pro Per respondent in place of his mother, Sveta Obukhova, who is deceased. Parties and witnesses are sworn. Mr. Obukhova presents the Court with a Small Estate Affidavit, and a death certificate. The Court finds everything in order, and with no objection from Mr. Lipson, Mr. Obukhova presents respondent's case in the narrative.
Mr. Lipson makes an oral motion to dismiss the suit, due to Mr. Obukhova not having any interest in the claim. Judge Fleming, after listening to argument, denies the motion for non-suit. Both parties then present their respective cases.
EXH(R)A multiple pages, re customs receipts.
9:42am
The matter is submitted, evidence is admitted and retained

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-08-2006 Continued To Feb-14-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: 9:30am:
Judge Pro Tem James H. Fleming, Clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record.

6 related cases are heard together: 028189, 028191, 028194, 028196, *028198, 028199. Detailed minutes, and exhibits, will be entered under Case No. 028189. (Exhibits will be retained in that file until returned to parties.)

Anna Levitan, official Russian Interpreter, appears with Mr. Lipson, to serve as translator for the appellants in all 6 related cases; Mr. Alec Berger serves as an informal Russian interpreter for the Respondents in all 6 related cases. Mr. Berger's wife, Nelly Merzhevitsky is also present in court to assist.

*028198
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Respondent, Sveta Obukhova (only named respondent) is deceased. Her son, Oleg Obukhova, signs the stip and order for Judge Pro Tem. Appellant, Michael Nazlukhanyan, appears through counsel Kenneth A. Lipson. Judge Fletcher determines that the case should be continued to allow Mr. Oleg Obukhova to consult an attorney re his rights to represent his mother in this case.

Matter is continued to Feb-14-07. New notices will be mailed to parties.
11:40am
All 6 matters are submitted

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Continued To Dec-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
